title: lotus neglecta
intro: Lotus neglecta is a species of flowering plant in the family Nelumbonaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lotus neglecta include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lotus neglecta include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
